loginHeroDescription: Access your dashboard, manage appointments, and stay connected with your healthcare journey.
signInDescription: Enter your email and password to access your account
emailVerifiedDescription: You can now login to your account
emailVerifiedToast: Email verified successfully. You can now sign in.
patientRegisterSubtitle: Join thousands of patients getting better care.
patientHeroA: Find the Best Care for You
patientHeroDescription: Book appointments with top doctors, manage your health records, and get personalized care.
doctorRegisterSubtitle: Enter your professional details to get verified.
doctorHeroDescription: Connect with millions of patients, manage your appointments efficiently, and grow your practice.
registrationWelcome: Welcome to Medora! Your account has been created.
verificationReview: Thank you for registering. Your BM&DC number is under review.
verifyEmailPrompt: Please verify your email to continue.
uploadBmdcDocHelp: Please upload a clear scan of your registration certificate.
forgotPasswordSubtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPasswordHeroDescription: We'll help you get back to your account safely and securely.
emailSentDescription: Check your inbox for the password reset link
resetPasswordHeroDescription: Create a strong, secure password for your Medora account.
setNewPasswordDescription: Choose a strong password to secure your account.
resetCompleteDescription: Your password has been successfully updated.
forgotPasswordFailed: Failed to send reset email. Please try again.
resetPasswordFailed: Failed to reset password. Please try again.
noRecoveryToken: No recovery token found. Please request a new password reset link.
invalidRecoveryLink: Invalid recovery link. Please request a new password reset link.
expiredRecoveryLink: This reset link has expired. Please request a new one.
resetUnknownError: Something went wrong. Please request a new password reset link.
passwordRuleLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
passwordRuleUpper: Password must contain an uppercase letter
passwordRuleLower: Password must contain a lowercase letter
